'''Cartariun''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] stationed in an Imperial Garrison on the world of [[Malrev IV]].

==Biography==
When Cartariun was a boy, he manifested mild Force-sensitivity. Having seen the [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|fate]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]], he kept his talent hidden. He would eventually join the Empire and served in a construction team that was sent to the planet Malrev IV to construct an outpost in a [[Sith Temple (Malrev IV)|Sith temple]].<ref name="Aliens in the Empire">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/96/indexp2.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 1: Hierarchy of Power}}</ref>

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], his comrades on the planet left to help the Empire in the following conflicts. The [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] stayed after discovering the latent powers within the Sith Temple that haunted his former companions. He studied the ways of the Sith with the intention of becoming the next [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]], but he was unaware that his mediocre skills had been augmented by the [[Sith sorcery/Legends|magics]] of the temple.<ref name="Aliens in the Empire2">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/96/indexp2.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 1: Hierarchy of Power}}</ref>

[[File:Cartariun.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Cartariun]]
In isolation for several years, the former Imperial lost his mind but gained enough knowledge of Sith magic to extend his power to the native tribes of the [[Irrukiine]], driving the wolf-like locals into a frenzied bloodlust while controlling their every action through his dark power. Cartariun suffered the fate of all those who claimed power through the dark side when [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], on a rescue mission for a crashed [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]], discovered the reclusive madman scheming to reclaim the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] throne. Although he managed to capture [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and had his servants [[Malrev incident|attack]] the Rogues, the former escaped and his squadron mates defeated Cartariun's cohorts. Cartariun was killed by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operative [[Girov Dza'tey]], who also desired the power of the temple.
